about.about2: Enjoying the game? <0>Buy me a coffee!</0>
about.heading: About

app.description: Play Chinese Wordle for free! Guess the daily Chinese idiom (成语) in 6 tries. Learn Chinese the fun way with pinyin, meanings and examples.
app.title: Wordle Chinese - Play Chinese Wordle Online Free | Daily Idiom Puzzle Game

dashboard.heading: Congratulations, you've made it! {{gamesCount}}+ games!
dashboard.subheading: Here you have access to ALL idiom games, including the ones you might have not played. Click on the box to play a specific idiom game.

hints.absentLetter: ❌ The letter {{letter}} ({{pinyin}}) is NOT in the idiom.
hints.presentLetter: ✅ The letter {{letter}} ({{pinyin}}) is in the idiom.

howToPlay.heading: How to play
howToPlay.how2: Each guess must be a valid 4-letter idiom. Hit the enter button to submit.
howToPlay.how3: After each guess, the color of the tiles will change to show how close your guess was to the idiom.
howToPlay.how4: A new idiom will be available every day.

ui.avoidSpoilers: Please don't share answers to avoid spoilers!
ui.confirmRandom: Are you sure you want to start a new random game?
ui.easyEnableHardMode: Too easy? Tap ⓘ to enable "Hard mode 🔥"!
